sizing_rule.note: For multi-leg options positions, solve Equation (5.14) across discrete price scenarios (±X standard deviations) to find optimal f that maximizes geometric mean HPR. f ranges from 0 to 1 and represents the optimal fraction of capital to allocate.

source_rule_text: For multiple simultaneous options positions (with or without underlying), find the optimal f value between 0 and 1 that maximizes geometric mean HPR using discrete price scenarios.
